---
title: "My first post"
date: 2026-03-03
---

This is a starter post to prove the workflow end-to-end.

## Inline math

Euler’s identity: $e^{i\\pi} + 1 = 0$.

## Display math

$$
\\nabla \\cdot \\mathbf{E} = \\frac{\\rho}{\\varepsilon_0}
$$

## A short derivation (LaTeX text, not images)

If $f(x) = x^2$, then $f'(x) = 2x$.
